features.featureTitle: Update the BankFinanceBanner component to clearly display the correct financing terms: 90% loan approved by bank and 10% paid by the customer. Update all related translation strings in English, Hindi, and Odia (translations.ts) to reflect '90% Bank Loan' and '10% Customer Payment' accurately. Ensure stat cards and any descriptive text in the banner reflect these exact figures.

Replace the current hero background in the Hero component with the newly generated Samaleswari Temple Sambalpur image (samaleswari-temple-hero.dim_1920x1080.png) stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Ensure the image is set as the full-screen background with an appropriate dark overlay so that headline text and CTA buttons remain clearly legible.
